name: jayson-docs
description: Acme consulting deliverable generators (PPTX + DOCX) via template-fill, driven by the user's own agentic LLM (BYO LLM). No API key required.
author: Acme Consulting

skills.name: commercial-proposal-pptx
skills.description: Generate an Acme commercial proposal as a PowerPoint deck (.pptx) — sales pitch / mandate-winning.

skills.name: commercial-proposal-docx
skills.description: Generate an Acme commercial proposal as a Word document (.docx) — written proposal (document form of the pitch).

skills.name: report-pptx
skills.description: Generate an Acme delivery / steering-committee deck as PowerPoint (.pptx). v1: kpi-row-chart only (D20).

skills.name: report-docx
skills.description: Generate an Acme written report / executive memo as Word (.docx).

_note: Optional Cowork packaging (D15): the product is a portable skills pack + app driven by any agentic LLM (BYO LLM). If publishing a Cowork plugin, verify this manifest via the cowork-plugin-management:create-cowork-plugin skill.
